nodes.label: Tests for tools/skill_usage.py — sidecar telemetry + provenance filtering.
Isolated HERMES_HOME with a clean skills/ dir for each test.
Create a minimal SKILL.md with a name: frontmatter field.
Skills archived under nested category subdirs (e.g.     .archive/<category>/<sk
Prefix-match path (timestamped dupes) must also descend into nested     archive
Telemetry bumps on bundled skills are dropped — the sidecar must stay     focus
State transitions on bundled skills must not land in the sidecar.
If a bundled skill now occupies the name, refuse to restore.
The combined guarantee: no curator code path can archive, mark stale,     set-s
